title: Episode Metadata
description: Interface contract between Track A (Python pipeline) and Track B (Next.js website). Defines the episode metadata JSON structure written to Cloudflare R2 and consumed by the product website.

episode_id.description: Date-based episode identifier in YYYY-MM-DD format.

title.description: Episode title for display in podcast apps and on the website.

description.description: Episode description for podcast feed and website SEO.

publish_date.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime when the episode is published.

audio_url.description: URL to the episode audio file on Cloudflare R2 CDN.

bonus_audio_url.description: URL to the bonus audio segment on R2. Null when no bonus content exists for this episode.

chapters.description: Ordered list of chapter segments with league-level navigation points. Chapters should be in chronological order with no gaps or overlaps — enforced by runtime validators in Stories 1.2/1.3.

title.description: Chapter title, typically the league or segment name.

start_seconds.description: Chapter start time in seconds from episode beginning.

end_seconds.description: Chapter end time in seconds from episode beginning. Must be greater than start_seconds — enforced by runtime validators in Stories 1.2/1.3.

leagues.description: League slugs covered in this chapter.

presenters.description: List of presenter roles featured in this episode.

leagues_covered.description: All leagues covered in this episode, using canonical league ID slugs.

fpl_segment.description: Whether this episode includes FPL (Fantasy Premier League) data woven into match analysis.

show_notes_html.description: Pre-rendered HTML show notes for display on the website. Track B sanitizes before rendering.
